## MessagePaneUserLogger class

Console-based user logger that logs to console and adds messages to the pane.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class MessagePaneUserLogger extends Logging.LoggerBase implements IUserLogReporter 
```
**Extends:** Logging.LoggerBase

**Implements:** [IUserLogReporter](./ts-chocolate-ui.iuserlogreporter.md)
